agent_hint: Create a new employee record. Required: name, department (ENGINEERING/SALES/MARKETING/FINANCE/HR/OPERATIONS/OTHER), hire_date. Optional: position, email, phone, notes. Auto-generated: code (EMP-yyyyMMdd-seq), status (active).
precondition_description: No preconditions — any authenticated user with THR.employee.manage permission can create an employee.
output_description: Returns the created employee record with auto-generated code and initial status active.

agent_hint: Update an existing employee record. Editable fields: name, department, position, email, phone, hire_date, notes. Status is NOT editable here — use state transition commands instead.
precondition_description: Employee must exist; status field cannot be changed via this command.
output_description: Returns the updated employee record with all modified fields.

agent_hint: Transition employee status from active to ON_LEAVE. Indicates the employee is on extended leave (maternity, sabbatical, etc.). Can be reversed via return_from_leave command.
precondition_description: Employee must be in active status.
output_description: Returns the updated employee record with status set to ON_LEAVE.

agent_hint: Transition employee status from ON_LEAVE back to active. Indicates the employee has returned from leave and is back to work.
precondition_description: Employee must be in ON_LEAVE status.
output_description: Returns the updated employee record with status set back to active.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认将此员工标记为已离职？此操作不可撤销。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Confirm marking this employee as resigned? This cannot be undone.

agent_hint: Transition employee status to RESIGNED. This is a terminal state — resigned employees cannot be reactivated. Allowed from both active and ON_LEAVE. Requires user confirmation.
precondition_description: Employee must be in active or ON_LEAVE status.
output_description: Returns the updated employee record with terminal status RESIGNED.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认删除此员工记录？此操作不可撤销。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Confirm delete this employee record? This action is irreversible.

agent_hint: Delete an employee record permanently. Irreversible operation. Precondition: employee status must be active — employees on leave or resigned cannot be deleted.
precondition_description: Employee must be in active status; employees in ON_LEAVE or RESIGNED status cannot be deleted.
output_description: Returns confirmation of deletion; the employee record is permanently removed.

agent_hint: Retrieve a single employee record by ID. Returns all fields including status, department, position, and hire date.
precondition_description: Employee with the specified ID must exist.
output_description: Returns the full employee record including all fields.

agent_hint: Query employee records with pagination and filtering. Supports filters by status, department, position. Supports keyword search on name and code.
precondition_description: No preconditions — returns empty list if no employees match.
output_description: Returns a paginated list of employee records matching the specified filters.
